headline: Devon Energy (DVN) Stock Drops Despite Market Gains: Important Facts to Note
summary: The latest trading day saw Devon Energy (DVN) settling at $50.78, representing a -1.16% change from its previous close.

headline: National Fuel Gas Q2 Earnings Lag Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: NFG posts higher Q2 revenues and earnings year over year, but adjusted EPS misses estimates as production volumes decline.
